arts.ttl: Chelsea put off by goalkeeper’s €80m asking price
arts.sum: Chelsea made multiple enquiries to sign AC Milan goalkeeper Mike Maignan in the summer but were put off by the player’s €80m (£66.7m) asking price. The West London side sought to sign a new first-choice goalkeeper in the summer after allowing Djordje Petrovic and Kepa Arrizabalaga to leave on loan. arts.ttl: AC Milan looking for three in a row against Lecce
arts.sum: Milan have avoided defeat in 15 of their last 16 home games in Serie A (W10 D5), scoring in each of these matches (37 goals, 2.3 per game); their only defeat in this period was against Inter in April. Milan have avoided defeat in 24 of their last 25 matches against Lecce in Serie A (W13 D11), scoring 2.3 goals-per-game on average in the process (57 goals scored); the only Lecce success in this period came in April 2006 (1-0 at Via del Mare stadium).

arts.ttl: Serie A | Milan v Lecce: Match Preview
arts.sum: AC Milan will look to maintain their winning momentum as they host Lecce at San Siro on Friday evening in Serie A. Coming off a morale-boosting victory over city rivals Inter Milan, Paulo Fonseca’s side aims for their third consecutive league win. Milan’s 2-1 triumph in the Derby della Madonnina last Sunday eased the pressure on Fonseca after a shaky start to the season. The Rossoneri now sit sixth in the Serie A table with eight points from five matches. Their opponents, Lecce, are winless since August and suffered a midweek Coppa Italia elimination at the hands of Serie B The post Serie A | Milan v Lecce: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Maignan’s Milan renewal: A boost for the Rossoneri
arts.sum: The recent derby victory has reignited enthusiasm within the Milan camp, particularly among fans who were disappointed with the team’s slow start under new manager Paulo Fonseca. Now, there’s another reason for Milanisti to celebrate: goalkeeper Mike Maignan is on the verge of extending his contract with the club. MilanNews report that negotiations between Milan and Maignan’s representatives have been ongoing for several weeks, but recent discussions have brought the two parties closer than ever. An agreement to extend the French goalkeeper’s contract until 2028 is now imminent. arts.ttl: Fonseca: “We have to win against Lecce tomorrow”
arts.sum: AC Milan manager Paulo Fonseca stressed the significance of their upcoming Serie A match against Lecce in his pre-match press conference. Following victories over Venezia and Inter, Milan are seeking their third consecutive league win at San Siro. Fonseca began by highlighting the match’s importance: “This game is very important. We must confirm that we are growing. We need to recover points and everything is important to have the motivation to win tomorrow.
